name: Permission Matrix
description: Role-based access control grid showing permissions by role. Used for workspace settings and team management.

slots.permissions: Row labels with permission names and descriptions

visual_brief: Grid table with role names as column headers and permission categories as row labels. Each cell contains a checkbox or toggle indicating whether that role has that permission. Permission rows are grouped by category (Content, Users, Settings, Billing) with bold category headers. The simple preset shows a reduced set of roles and permissions. The granular preset shows every permission with sub-categories. An 'Add Custom Role' button appears after the last column header. Hovering a permission row shows a description tooltip. Changed but unsaved permissions are highlighted with a subtle accent background.

responsive.mobile: Matrix transposes — each role becomes a section with permission checkboxes listed vertically. Role selector at top switches between roles. Horizontal scroll alternative for small matrices.
responsive.tablet: Standard matrix with horizontal scroll if more than 4 roles. Touch-friendly checkbox sizes.
responsive.desktop: Full matrix grid with all roles and permissions visible. Sticky left column for permission names. Sticky header row for role names.
